name: Empress Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the mushrooms thoroughly and remove and chop their stems.
2. In a pan, sauté onions and garlic in 1/4 cup olive oil until transparent.
3. Add chopped mushroom stems, prosciutto, parsley, marjoram, salt, and pepper to the pan. Sauté for about 2 minutes.
4. Add wine to the mixture.
5. Mix in bread crumbs until the mixture reaches a consistency of mush.
6. Coat the tops of the mushrooms with remaining olive oil.
7. Stuff each mushroom with a tablespoon of the mixture.
8. Sprinkle Parmigiano cheese on top and bake at 375°F for 3-7 minutes, depending on the size of the mushrooms.
